subcodes.first_line: O Glory! This is a Name that hath appeared in the world and by which the nations were shaken, and every remote oppressor hath chosen My Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بهاء هذا اسم ظهر فی العالم و اضطرب به الامم و کل ظالم بعید اسمی اختیار
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @goodly deeds; actions, @service to others; to the Cause of God
